known_limitations: formal test contains only six parent clusters
9E6Y is reference-interface rescoring, not an independent second docking run
required_checks: formal blinded manifest contains no geometry or contact labels
three exact seeds 83,89,97 each produce checkpoint, config, dev predictions, and blinded formal predictions
evaluator merges sealed labels one-to-one by candidate_id, sequence_sha256, and parent_framework_cluster
ensemble metrics include Recall@20%, EF@10%, NDCG, relevance Spearman, geometry metrics, and uncertainty
parent-cluster bootstrap CI and paired parent-cluster permutation are reported
label shuffle, hotspot shuffle, antigen ablation, target permutation, and VHH-only controls are reported
generic replay contact/paratope retention is reported
artifact manifest binds source, configs, teacher files, checkpoints, predictions, and preregistration hashes
claim boundary remains docking surrogate rather than binding or experimental blocking truth
